'''Plu Makor''' was a [[Near-Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] operative who ran a [[Starship/Legends|ship]] repair shop on [[G-Station Seven]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] that [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Genesia]]. He was distinguished from a typical [[Human/Legends|Human]] by his red [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and the short barbs which surrounded his eyes and temples. He was also the owner of the ''[[Helping Hand]]'', a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]].
